reviews.review_description: It’s a on rails shooter, with cool graphics, but sadly I don’t think I’ve ever liked, a shooter on rails. Gameplay seems ok, but lost interest very fast. For me mainly because I’m not a fan of the style, I give 2 stars. As I know the work went into the game, and I do respect the work that was done. But when you just stand in one area, and can’t physically move around, sadly it was very basic, compared to the trailer.

Brilliant graphics. I just hope  the davs give this game a lot of updates. For a start I like to be able to walk .and guns stick to your hands. The details of the guns keep popping up  .  But earlier access just 4 pounds. I'm looking forward to whot the devs do next if..
